recommendations.overview: Two very different families converge on Martha's Vineyard one weekend for a wedding.

recommendations.title: Hush

recommendations.title: The Honeymoon Killers

recommendations.title: My Wife's Husband

recommendations.title: As Needed
recommendations.overview: A 40-year-old world-famous chef with anger management issues is assigned to run a cooking class at a centre for young people with autism.

recommendations.title: My Favourite Cake
recommendations.overview: Mahin lives alone in Tehran since her husband’s death and her daughter’s departure for Europe, until an afternoon tea with friends leads her to break her solitary routine and revitalize her love life.

recommendations.overview: Writer Ernest Hemingway begins a romance with fellow scribe Martha Gellhorn.
